title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies!
